chapter_title.en: Chapter on Supplications at the Time of Breaking the Fast Each Night in the Month of Ramadan

text: 1852 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «يُسْتَجَابُ دُعَاءُ اَلصَّائِمِ عِنْدَ اَلْإِفْطَارِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1852 - Imam (as) said: "The supplication of the fasting person is answered at the time of breaking the fast."
